pkgmetadata.longdescription: Ambient-light-driven auto-brightness daemon for Apple Silicon MacBooks running Asahi Linux. Reads lux from the AOP ambient light sensor (VD6286 via the aop_als kernel driver) and drives both the display backlight (apple-panel-bl) and the keyboard backlight (kbd_backlight) from one sensor reading. Features: 30 Hz exponential smoothing, per-channel manual override via external-write detection (brightnessctl + compositor keybinds work normally), and AC-vs-battery curve scaling.
